name: hume-taste-engine
description: Deterministic instrument engine for measuring taste against Hume's Standard of Taste — starting with the Prestige-Bias Test (blind vs. labeled rating, swapped-label controls, edge-artifact-aware statistics).
$comment: private:true until the owner approves publication (repo/npm). Source of truth for the engine remains src/engine/bias.ts in the app until first publish — keep copies in sync.
